goal: Implement member registration, profiles, CRUD with cursor-paginated listing

tasks.name: Member Entity + Repository + Service
tasks.action: Create Member entity (BaseEntity, memberNumber, name, email, phone, nationalId, status, shareBalance BigDecimal). MemberRepository with cursor pagination. MemberService with CRUD + suspend/reactivate.

tasks.name: Member REST API
tasks.action: REST controller at /api/v1/members with POST, GET (list+detail), PUT, PATCH (suspend/reactivate). ApiResponse<T> wrapping. Validated DTOs. MemberMapper for entity-DTO conversion.

tasks.name: Liquibase Changelogs
tasks.action: Create members table with all columns, indexes on member_number, email, national_id, status. Update sacco-app changelog-master.

commitMessage: feat(member): implement member management with CRUD and cursor pagination
